title: Unit 00
wikitext:
[]: Unit-00 [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by Jesterhead » Fri Oct 23, 2009 10:41 pm Lots of spoilers ahead: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Rock-Slash » Fri Oct 23, 2009 11:42 pm I think that you don`t need to put spoiler tag in a thread with spoilers on the tittle. Also the only think that was unusual of Unit 00 was that bandage, why would you put a BANDAGE OVER THE ARMOR of a giant robot?, the other think is that apparently Unit 00 had a heart in each foot and tons of blood to make those jeysers after it was eaten, aside from that nothing unusual.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Oct 23, 2009 11:45 pm Why would Gendo put something so important in something so invaluable, then take off a huge chunk of that expendable thing so you can use a crippled version of that thing to fight while protecting the important thing? It accomplishes nothing but damages a perfectly good Eva for no damn reason.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Oct 24, 2009 1:26 am They simply didn't put priority on repairing 00 after the Sahaquiel battle. During the /Seele scene where they talked about getting Eva-03 to Japan, one of the Seele dudes even mentioned that "Unit-00 is teh suck, no need to repair it". 


[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sat Oct 24, 2009 1:34 am They said earlier they put precedent on the repair of EVA-01 , and EVA-00 had been in fact injured holding Sahaquiel's Core in place. It's a bit of a strenuous connection, but it works.
